item.description: En este momento está Jack & Jones Men s Chino Pants | Stretch Trousers Tapered Cut | Slim Fit Look JPSTMARCO JJBOWIE Color:Armada Talla de pantalón:29W / 30L Z - Länge L30/32/34/36/38:L30 en el siguiente enlace! 🔎: PERFECT- A super all-rounder for your daily look! JPSTMARCO JJBOWIE - 12150148 by Jack & Jones. FLEXIBLE - Two welt pockets at the back and slanted front pockets each offer plenty of room. MATERIAL - Stretch fabric made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane.
